hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); (print('[Tailwind CSS Enforcer] Run tailwind-css-enforcer agent to audit CSS classes in: '+fp),sys.exit(0)) if any(fp.endswith(e) for e in ('.tsx','.jsx','.css','.scss','.sass','.html','.vue')) else None"
